issue_body_preview:
Hey! @Kshitij978 - nice changes especially the URL text copy button. I have seen one anomaly in the graph where background color and graph plotting are not aligned properly, as can be seen in the screenshots :
- Newer Version
 ![newer-version](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/69510006/151
test_description_zh: 打开首页，生成一个 GitHub 活动图（Activity Graph），观察图表的背景颜色区域与折线/数据绘制区域的对齐情况，检查背景色是否完整覆盖图表绘制区域，边界是否一致对齐。
expected_result_zh: 图表的背景颜色区域应与数据折线绘制区域完全对齐，背景色完整覆盖整个图表区域，不出现错位、溢出或未覆盖的情况。
